results.title: Karnataka dam water levels on July 23: Almatti reservoir crosses 100 TMC as inflow rises
results.description: Heavy rainfall in Maharashtra and the Krishna river basin has pushed water storage in Karnataka’s Almatti reservoir above 100 TMC. If inflows continue at the current pace, the reservoir could reach full capacity within a week. However, water levels in KRS, Kabini, Hemavathi and Tungabhadra remain below last year’s levels.

Velocity shuts out league’s top attack, extends winning streak to three
results.description: SPOKANE, Wash. — Spokane Velocity FC continued its hot streak Wednesday night, defeating Charlotte Independence 3-0 at ONE Spokane Stadium to earn its third consecutive victory and climb into fourth place in the USL League One standings.
